parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'country', operator: 'NOT_HAS_PROPERTY' }] }], properties: ['name', 'domain'], limit: 100, ...($json.after ? { after: $json.after } : {}) }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const companyData = $('Prepare Company Data').item.json;
return { json: { companyId: companyData.companyId, companyName: companyData.companyName, country: 'Unknown', enrichmentSource: 'Unresolved', resolved: false } };

const d = $('Snapshot Data').item.json;
return { json: { companyId: d.companyId, companyName: d.companyName, country: d.country, enrichmentSource: d.enrichmentSource, resolved: d.resolved } };
